1823250.name: Wingsuit Thrill
1823250.description:
In this game, you can fly over beautiful landscapes to relax and enjoy the view. Or you can challenge yourself whenever you feel the need to spice up your flight. It's up to you!

Some game features:
  • Choose between a set of landscapes to fly over;
  • Change cameras whenever you feel like (including 1st and 3rd person cameras);
  • Choose between multiples starting points in the landscape;
  • Use your smoke device to draw something in the sky;
  • Use the in-game radio to choose what you want to listen to while flying;
  • Take photos of the views you like;
  • Change the time of the day you wanna fly.

Follow Pixelynt on Twitter and Instagram ( @pixelynt ) to keep up to date with Wingsuit Thrill news!
1823250.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
